chapter_voice_summary: BG 2.25 holds the chapter's didactic / corrective register. The three-property close is presented operationally; the therefore-clause is rendered as an explicit instruction (perform absolutely no mourning ritual). The v3→v4 routing scenario is detailed with restraint — the engineering director's one-message intervention is direct without being warm; the closing line ('the grief had been performative; the work had never been at the layer the deprecation operated on') is in the chapter's senior-engineer-not-consoling voice. Diction is elevated (contractual obligation, mourning ritual, altitudes deprecation cannot reach, stratum) consistent with the chapter's didactic register. Tone consistent across 2.21-2.25. PASS.
